flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Eastern Washington University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (6.5k vs 8.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Washington University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (7.6k → 6.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Washington University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (49.6% → 43.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Washington University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
